description_long: This is a large commercial passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily white, featuring a blue underbelly and a red, white, and blue tail fin in a stylized flag pattern. The aircraft has two large turbofan engines mounted under its low, swept-back wings, which are equipped with subtle upward-angled winglets at the tips. The nose is rounded and houses a forward-positioned, multi-window cockpit, while the main body displays the airline's branding in bold letters. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design. The airplane's surface appears smooth and glossy, with visible panel lines and details typical of modern commercial jets.
description: A large, white commercial jet with blue engines and a red, white, and blue tail fin, featuring swept low wings and a streamlined fuselage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the airplane, the airline branding, and the detailed tail fin design.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail fin, horizontal stabilizers, and the symmetry of the wings and engines.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the airplane, including the engines and wing structure.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the rounded nose, cockpit windows, and the underwing placement of the two engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with long, swept-back wings and subtle upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear (not visible but implied by commercial jet design)
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows
